assertions.text: Recommends writing an ADR explaining the UserRepository requirement
assertions.evidence: Layer 2c includes a full ADR template as docs/adr/0012-user-repository-mandatory.md

assertions.text: Recommends adding an entry to CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md
assertions.evidence: Layer 4a is CLAUDE.md/.cursorrules with a Data Access Rules section

assertions.text: States the positive alternative in the constraint (use UserRepository, not just prohibition)
assertions.evidence: CLAUDE.md entry includes 'ALWAYS use UserRepository to access user data'

assertions.text: Explains why documenting the 'why' is important specifically for AI tools
assertions.evidence: Response mentions AI tools weight concrete examples heavily and includes AI-specific signals section, but does not explain that the ADR prevents AI from removing/refactoring the constraint. The 'why' is framed as useful but not explained as a guard against AI optimization.

assertions.text: Recommends at least one code-level documentation mechanism
assertions.evidence: Layer 1a covers deprecation annotations; Layer 2b covers inline comments on UserRepository

assertions.text: Addresses both human engineers and AI tools explicitly
assertions.evidence: Response has dedicated sections for Layer 4 AI-Specific Signals alongside human-focused layers
